---
title: "Sam van Puyenbroeck"
description: "Team member, computational proteomics"
image: ../assets/images/sam.jpg
order: 20
orcid: "https://orcid.org/0009-0001-5281-6891"
---

## About

Research focus: computational proteomics at Ghent University and VIB.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-5281-6891)
